title: Incorrect output format from Function node
symptom: The workflow sometimes throws an error indicating the output format is wrong, or it processes only one item instead of the full list.
applies_when: Using a Function node to process multiple items
not_this_if: Function node is returning an array of items correctly
root_cause: The Function node in n8n expects an array of items to be returned when processing multiple records. If only a single item is returned, it can lead to errors or incomplete processing of the data.
fix_steps: Modify the return statement in the Function node to return the full results array instead of just the first item.
Consider restructuring the workflow to place the Split In Batches node right after the HTTP Request.
agent_instruction: Change the return statement in the Function node to return the full results array.
